name: Songs of the Dominators
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>列</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>詩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>篇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have no monsters in your GY, you can activate this card from your hand. When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field: Negate that effect, then if you have a Trap in your GY, you can add 1 "Dominus" card from your Deck to your hand. If you activated this card from your hand, you cannot activate the effects of monsters in your hand, GY, and banishment, until the end of the next turn. You can only activate 1 "Songs of the Dominators" per turn.
eff: If you have no monsters in your GY, you can activate this card from your hand. When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field: Negate that effect, then if you have a Trap in your GY, you can add 1 "Dominus" card from your Deck to your hand. If you activated this card from your hand, you cannot activate the effects of monsters in your hand, GY, and banishment, until the end of the next turn. You can only activate 1 "Songs of the Dominators" per turn.

mst: Can be activated from the hand
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
misc: Requires having no monsters in Graveyard
